```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement configuration management with Ansible"
---
# Ansible Configuration
## Task
Manage server configuration with Ansible.
## Requirements
1. Define inventory for all environments. 2. Write idempotent playbooks.
3. Use roles for reusable configuration. 4. Implement vault for secrets.
5. Test playbooks with molecule.
## Constraints
- Playbooks must be idempotent. Test before applying. Use tags for selective runs.
## Success Criteria
- Config managed declaratively. Playbooks idempotent. Tested. Secrets vaulted.
```
